query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "in-context world modeling for robotic control" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference for "in-context learning" and "meta-learning" techniques, and criterion (a) by investigating the same core mechanism (in-context world/task modeling) applied to a different domain (protein sequences vs. robotic control), which is essential for a literature review comparing cross-domain applications of the method.
